subQuestions.text:
Consider the following set of process, with the length of the CPU burst given in milliseconds.
Process | Burst Time | Priority
P1      | 10         | 3
P2      | 1          | 1
P3      | 2          | 3
P4      | 1          | 4
P5      | 5          | 2
The processes are assumed to have arrived in the order P1, P2, P3, P4, P5 all at time 0. Calculate the turnaround time of each process by applying priority scheduling algorithm.

Process | Arrival Time | Burst Time
P1      | 5            | 5
P2      | 4            | 6
P3      | 3            | 7
P4      | 1            | 9
P5      | 2            | 2
P6      | 6            | 3
